temporal_description:
(00:00-00:05) In a dimly lit, modern office, a man in a white shirt and tie, Huang King-chi, stands with his hand on his hip, addressing his subordinates. He points towards a security monitor displaying a black-and-white feed of a person in a chair. He informs them that all the deceased and injured suspects are Han Chen's subordinates. (Storyline: The scene establishes the initial situation: a series of violent events have occurred, and the police have identified the primary suspect's organization. The police chief is briefing his team on the current status.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, ambient soundscape.)
(00:06-00:11) Huang King-chi continues his briefing, stating that Han Chen himself is still at large. He gestures with his hand, emphasizing the urgency of the situation. The camera focuses on the faces of his subordinates, who listen with serious and concerned expressions. (Storyline: The stakes are raised as it's revealed the main target, Han Chen, is not yet captured. The police are now faced with a difficult situation: hunt a dangerous fugitive while dealing with his loyalists.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Grave, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense ambient score continues.)
